model.label: GPT-5.4
model.description: OpenAI • Frontier GPT model for general-purpose reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows.

pick.rationale: Houston is the clear pick because the underlying quality gap is massive: the Cougars rank No. 5 in both KenPom and Torvik with elite top-15 offense and top-five defense, while Idaho sits around No. 136-145 with only modest efficiency on both ends. The market also reflects that mismatch, with Houston installed around a 23.5-point favorite. Idaho’s credible path is limited to extreme shooting variance and Houston having an unusually poor offensive night, but I did not find a major availability concern strong enough to justify fading the Cougars.

reasoningStep.title: Houston’s two-way dominance outweighs Idaho’s upset path
reasoningStep.summary: Houston has a huge edge in predictive ratings, defensive quality, and market expectation, making this one of the safer 2-over-15 picks on the board. Idaho is respectable for a 15-seed and could hang around if it shoots well and slows the game, but its overall profile is far below Houston’s.
evidence: Houston ratings: KenPom No. 5 (AdjEM 33.55, AdjO 124.6 No. 16, AdjD 91.0), Torvik No. 5 (AdjO 125.10 No. 13, AdjD 91.85 No. 4), record 28-5.
Idaho ratings: KenPom No. 145 (AdjEM 1.54, AdjO 108.9 No. 176, AdjD 107.4), Torvik No. 136 (AdjO 108.81 No. 166, AdjD 106.17 No. 122), record 21-14.
Betting market preview listed Houston as roughly a 23.5-point favorite with a 136.5 total, signaling a major expected class gap.
Recent searches did not surface a major Houston injury or availability issue significant enough to materially change the matchup outlook.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-south-8
Current game label: South 2/15
Round: Round of 64
